g.text: v2 additions: RateLimitFilter (Bucket4j, Redis-backed), SHA-256 url_hash for dedup, cache-warm on create (TTL 1h ±10% jitter)

g.text: Error: 429 Too Many Requests if rate limit exceeded (Retry-After + X-RateLimit-* headers)
